recalls.Description: The recall affects MPINOI adult portable bed rails, which are white metal structures measuring approximately 15 inches wide and 26 inches tall. These bed rails feature an extendable handle with gray padding and a black storage mesh pocket that displays the "MPINOI" brand name. The product poses a serious risk of entrapment and potential asphyxiation, as it does not comply with mandatory safety standards for adult portable bed rails.
recalls.Title: MPINOI Adult Portable Bed Rails Recalled Due to Entrapment and Asphyxiation Risks
recalls.ConsumerContact: For further assistance, reach out via email at MPINOIproductrecall@outlook.com.

Images.Caption: Recalled MPINOI Bed Rail
MPINOI is printed on the mesh pocket of the recalled bed rail

Retailers.Name: Available online at Amazon.com from December 2025 to February 2026 for approximately $30.

Importers.Name: Guangzhou Aoran Trading Co., Ltd., dba Bioenrrty, of China

Hazards.Name: Entrapment and asphyxiation risk due to non-compliance with safety standards.

Remedies.Name: Immediately cease use of the recalled bed rails and contact Bioenrrty for a full refund. Consumers must destroy the bed rails by cutting the black safety strap in half and marking "RECALLED" on both the upper and lower rails with a permanent marker. A photo of the destroyed rails should be emailed to MPINOIproductrecall@outlook.com.

recalls.metaDescription: Recall of MPINOI Adult Portable Bed Rails due to serious risks of entrapment and asphyxiation. Immediate action required for safety.

recalls.Description: Vive Health has issued a recall for the Compact Bed Rail (model LVA2009SLV) and Bed Rail Collection V (model LVA2097SLV), along with units of the Bed Rail model LVA1024 purchased on or before August 21, 2023. Previously, units of model LVA1024 purchased after August 21, 2023, were recalled on February 19, 2026. These bed rails feature silver or white metal tubing and a black foam rubber grip handle, but may lack specific model numbers or branding.
recalls.Title: Vive Health Recalls Bed Rails Due to Serious Entrapment and Asphyxiation Risks; Two Fatalities Reported
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, consumers can reach Vive Health at 800-487-3808 from 9 a.m. to 9 p.m. ET, Monday through Friday, email recalls@vivehealth.com, or visit vivehealth.com/pages/recalls for further details.

Images.Caption: Recalled Vive Health Compact Bed Rail (model number LVA2009SLV)
Recalled Vive Health Bed Rail Collection V (model number LVA2097SLV)
Recalled Vive Health Compact Bed Rail (model number LVA1024)

Injuries.Name: Vive Health has received two reports of entrapment deaths associated with one model of the recalled bed rails. The deaths occurred in September 2024 and involved a 97-year-old man at an assisted living facility in Texas and a 93-year-old man at his home in Florida.

Retailers.Name: Vive Health distributed approximately 122,000 units of the recalled bed rails through medical supply stores nationwide and online at vivehealth.com, Amazon, and other medical supply websites. These bed rails were available from September 2019 to December 2025, priced between $45 and $90.

Importers.Name: Vive Health LLC, of Naples, Florida

Hazards.Name: Entrapment hazard leading to potential asphyxiation and death.

Remedies.Name: Immediately stop using the recalled bed rails and contact Vive Health for a full refund. Mark the bed rails as "RECALLED" with a permanent marker, take a photo with the buyer's name, and email it to recalls@vivehealth.com. Dispose of the product according to local waste disposal regulations.

recalls.metaDescription: Vive Health recalls bed rails due to serious entrapment risks, linked to two fatalities. Learn how to get a refund and safety instructions.

recalls.Description: Vive Health is recalling its Adult Bed Rails, specifically model LVA1024, which features a white frame and black handle, measuring 20 inches wide and 32 inches tall, and model LVA3031BLK, which has a black frame and handle, measuring 13 inches wide and 18 inches tall. These products pose serious risks of entrapment and asphyxiation, violating safety standards for adult portable bed rails. The bed rails lack necessary hazard warning labels, increasing the danger for users.
recalls.Title: Vive Health Recalls Adult Bed Rails Due to Entrapment and Asphyxiation Risks
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, consumers can reach Vive Health at 800-487-3808 from 9 a.m. to 9 p.m. ET, Monday through Friday, email recalls@vivehealth.com, or visit vivehealth.com/pages/recalls for further details.

Products.Name: Vive Health Bed Rail Model LVA1024

Importers.Name: Vive Health LLC, of of Naples Florida

Hazards.Name: Risk of entrapment and asphyxiation due to violation of safety standards.

Remedies.Name: Stop using the bed rails immediately and contact Vive Health for a full refund. Mark the bed rails as 'RECALLED' and send a photo with your name to recalls@vivehealth.com. Dispose of the product following local regulations. Only bed rails purchased after August 21, 2023, are affected.

recalls.metaDescription: Vive Health recalls adult bed rails due to serious entrapment and asphyxiation risks. Learn how to get a refund and dispose of the product safely.

recalls.Description:
Beloems has issued a recall for its adult portable bed rails, specifically model BL-BR201. These foldable bed rails feature white metal tubing and are equipped with rounded black or gray foam rubber handle grips, support legs, and a fabric pouch. The product is identifiable by the "Beloems" logo on the fabric cover and the model number found in the owner's manual. Consumers should be aware of the serious safety risks associated with these bed rails.

The recalled bed rails do not comply with mandatory safety standards, which can lead to entrapment or asphyxiation hazards. Additionally, they fail to meet structural stability requirements, posing a fall risk. Incorrectly sized push pins and holes further increase the risk of lacerations. It is crucial for consumers to take immediate action regarding this recall.
recalls.Title: Recall of Beloems Adult Portable Bed Rails Due to Serious Injury Risks
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, reach out to Beloems via email at leioujiapin@163.com.

Images.Caption: Recalled Beloems Adult Portable Bed Rail – black handles
Recalled Beloems Adult Portable Bed Rail – gray handles

Manufacturers.Name: Leioujiapin Technology Co., Ltd. dba Beloems, of China

Retailers.Name: Available online at Amazon.com from June 2025 to October 2025, priced around $90.

Hazards.Name: Entrapment and asphyxiation risks due to non-compliance with safety standards, fall hazards from instability, and laceration risks from improperly sized components.

Remedies.Name: Consumers must cease use of the recalled bed rails and contact Beloems for a full refund. To properly dispose of the bed rails, cut the foam padding on the handrails, mark the upper and lower rails with "RECALLED" using a permanent marker, and send a photo of the destroyed product to leioujiapin@163.com.

recalls.metaDescription: Beloems recalls adult portable bed rails due to serious injury risks. Immediate action required for consumer safety.

recalls.Description:
Fortemotus is recalling its adult portable bed rails, model USFTMTJAS008, due to significant safety concerns. These bed rails feature black tubing, foam rubber handle grips, support legs, and a fabric pouch, measuring approximately 30 inches in width and height. The Fortemotus logo can be found on the fabric cover, while the model number is listed in the owner's manual.

The recalled bed rails pose serious entrapment and asphyxiation hazards, as they do not comply with mandatory safety standards. Issues include improper sizing of push pins and holes, leading to potential laceration risks, as well as inadequate structural stability, which can result in falls.
recalls.Title: Recall of Fortemotus Adult Portable Bed Rails Due to Serious Injury Risks
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, consumers should reach out to Fortemotus Direct US via email at fortemotusofficial@outlook.com.

Images.Caption: Recalled Fortemotus Adult Portable Bed Rail

Manufacturers.Name: Guangzhou Kezhinuo Maoyi Youxian Gongsi, dba Fortemotus Direct US, of China

Retailers.Name: Available online at Amazon.com from August 2025 to October 2025 for approximately $100.

Hazards.Name: Entrapment and asphyxiation risks due to non-compliance with safety standards, fall hazards, and laceration risks from improperly sized components.

Remedies.Name: Consumers are urged to stop using the bed rails immediately and contact Fortemotus Direct US for a full refund. They should also destroy the rails by cutting the foam padding and send a photo of the destroyed product to fortemotusofficial@outlook.com.

recalls.metaDescription: Fortemotus recalls adult portable bed rails due to serious safety risks, including entrapment and asphyxiation. Contact for refunds.

recalls.Description: YOLAAH is recalling its model BR-01 Adult Portable Bed Rails due to serious safety concerns. These bed rails feature a black rubber hand grip, a storage pocket, and a white metal base, measuring 15.8 inches in height and 26.8 inches in width. The product is identifiable by the 'YOLAAH' label on the storage pocket. The design does not comply with mandatory safety standards, leading to potential entrapment and asphyxiation hazards for users.
recalls.Title: YOLAAH Adult Portable Bed Rails Recalled Due to Entrapment and Asphyxiation Risks
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, please contact YOLAAH via email at yolaahproductrecall@outlook.com.

recalls.Description: Sangohe has issued a recall for its adult portable bed rails due to serious safety concerns. These black, trapezoidal bed rails measure approximately 22.4 inches in width and 32 inches in height. They feature an extendable handle with gray padding and a mesh pocket for storage. The model number "KDB504A01FT" can be found on a label on the frame, either on the bottom foot tube or the horizontal cross tube, while the brand name "Sangohe" is displayed on the packaging.
recalls.Title: Sangohe Adult Portable Bed Rails Recalled Due to Entrapment and Asphyxiation Risks
recalls.ConsumerContact: For further assistance, consumers can reach out to Sangohe via email at SGHproductrecall@163.com or visit their website at https://commodechair.com/ and click on "Recall" for additional details.

recalls.Description: Agrish is recalling its adult portable bed rails, specifically models 2512, 2513, and 2516, designed for adult beds. These bed rails feature white tubing and rounded gray foam rubber grips, with some models including a gray fabric pouch, support legs, and a motion-sensor light. The model numbers can be found in the owner's manual. The dimensions of the recalled bed rails vary, with model 2512 measuring approximately 11 inches wide by 39 inches high, model 2513 at 12 inches wide by 42 inches high, and model 2516 at 37 inches wide by 45 inches high.
recalls.Title: Recall of Agrish Adult Portable Bed Rails Due to Serious Entrapment and Asphyxiation Risks
recalls.ConsumerContact: For more information, contact Agrish Direct at 800-613-5998, available from 10 a.m. to 5 p.m. CT Monday through Friday, or email agrish.us@outlook.com. Visit http://www.agrish.online/recall or go to www.agrish.online and click 'More' followed by 'Recall' for further details.

recalls.Description:
Ningbo Tianqi Electronic has announced a recall for FUFU&GAGA queen size Murphy wall beds featuring a white wood frame. These wall-mounted beds can fold into a cabinet and measure approximately 86 inches in height and 65 inches in width. The model number KF210284US-01MH-A001 is located on the instruction booklet and packaging. Consumers should be aware of the potential dangers associated with these products.

The wall bed's heavy 215-pound frame poses significant risks during assembly or disassembly, including the possibility of falling and causing severe impact, crush, or laceration injuries. It is crucial for consumers to take immediate action regarding this recall to ensure their safety.
recalls.Title: Ningbo Tianqi Electronic Issues Recall for FUFU&GAGA Murphy Wall Beds Due to Serious Safety Risks
recalls.ConsumerContact: For further assistance, consumers can reach out to Ningbo Tianqi Electronic at 208-820-0799 from 9 a.m. to 5 p.m. ET Monday through Friday, or via email at adelahu@fufugaga.com or support@fufugaga.zendesk.com. More information is also available online at www.fufugaga.com under the "RECALL INFORMATION" section.

Products.Name: FUFU&GAGA Queen Size Murphy Wall Bed

Images.Caption: FUFU&GAGA White Wood Frame Queen Size Murphy Wall Bed (unfolded)
FUFU&GAGA White Wood Frame Queen Size Murphy Wall Bed (folded)

Injuries.Name: The firm has received two reports of the wall beds falling during assembly when the wall beds were not anchored to the wall, resulting in two injured consumers. One consumer sustained a laceration, a bruise, and a fractured growth plate in her finger, and another consumer sustained a laceration to his face that required eight stitches.

Manufacturers.Name: Jiangsu Liangjiang Intelligent Furniture Co., Ltd, of China

Retailers.Name: Available online at HomeDepot.com and Lowes.com from January 2025 to April 2025 for approximately $550.

Importers.Name: Ningbo Tianqi Electronic Inc., of Denver, Colorado

Hazards.Name: Risk of impact, crush, and laceration injuries during assembly or disassembly

Remedies.Name: Stop using the wall beds and contact Ningbo Tianqi Electronic for a full refund, including a disassembly kit with necessary tools and instructions.

recalls.metaDescription: Recall alert for FUFU&GAGA Murphy wall beds due to impact and laceration hazards. Contact Ningbo Tianqi Electronic for a refund.

recalls.Description: KingPavonini is recalling six models of their adult portable bed rails due to serious safety concerns. These bed rails may pose risks of entrapment and asphyxiation when attached to a bed, violating mandatory safety standards. The models include BC-CBJ-X, BC-CBJ, BC-LDFS-X, LDFS-SSK, 04-BC-LDFS, and BC-LDFS, identifiable by their white or black tubing and black foam rubber grips. Some models also feature support legs and motion-sensor lights.
recalls.Title: Recall of KingPavonini Adult Portable Bed Rails Due to Entrapment and Asphyxiation Risks
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, contact KingPavonini at 888-281-8150 from 9 a.m. to 4 p.m. CT Monday through Friday, email service@kingpavonini.com, or visit https://www.kingpavonini.com.cn and click on 'Recall' for further details.

recalls.Description: WYBITNY has issued a recall for its children's bed rails due to a serious risk of entrapment that could lead to injury or death. These portable bed rails feature a white metal frame and dark gray fabric cushions filled with foam. The product is labeled with the brand name and the model number "BGRT003" on the fabric cushions. The design does not meet safety standards, allowing children to become trapped in gaps when the rails are installed next to a bed.
recalls.Title: WYBITNY Children's Bed Rails Recalled Due to Entrapment Hazard; Sold on Amazon
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, consumers should email WYBITNY at servicewybitny@outlook.com.

recalls.Description: Neaude has issued a recall for their adult portable bed rails, model BR0221SL001, which are designed for use on adult beds. These bed rails feature a silver top rail with matching support columns, blue accents, a red handle button, and a faux wood design with white accents. Measuring approximately 37 inches in width and 14 inches in height, the rails can be folded or unfolded using the red handle button.
recalls.Title: Neaude Adult Portable Bed Rails Recalled Due to Entrapment and Asphyxiation Risks
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, consumers can reach out to Neaude via email at ruiye1234@outlook.com or visit their website at https://neaudehealth.com/products/neaude-adult-portable-bed-rails. For more details, click on 'Free Refund - Register Here' at the top of the page.

recalls.Description:
Avenco and Novilla have issued a recall for their mattresses due to non-compliance with mandatory flammability standards, which poses a serious fire risk that could lead to injury or death. The affected mattresses come in various thicknesses of 6, 10, 12, and 14 inches and are available in sizes including twin, full, queen, and king. Each mattress features a white exterior with an accent color on the sides, available in light gray, dark gray, or navy, depending on the model. Important identification details such as the manufacturer name 'PT Champion', manufacturing date, model numbers, and sizes are printed on a sewn-in label on the side of the mattress. 

Consumers are advised to stop using these mattresses immediately and contact PT Champion for a free fitted cover that will ensure compliance with safety standards. The recall affects several models manufactured between November 2024 and January 2025, which can be identified by specific model numbers and manufacturing dates.
recalls.Title: Recall of Avenco and Novilla Mattresses Due to Fire Hazard Violating Flammability Standards
recalls.ConsumerContact: For further information, consumers can reach PT Champion via email at recall@champmattress.com or visit https://www.novilla.net/pages/recall or https://www.avencohome.com/pages/recall. Additional details can also be found on their websites by clicking 'Recall' at the bottom of the page.

Remedies.Name: Free fitted cover to ensure compliance with flammability standards

recalls.Description: DINBooonLUX is recalling its 12-Inch Full Size Hybrid Mattresses due to a serious fire hazard. These mattresses, which are 12 inches thick with a white top and blue sides, do not meet the mandatory flammability standards, posing a risk of severe injury or death. The brand name "DINBooonLUX" is displayed on a blue label on one side, while a white label features the factory number "Factory#2023KZF" and model number "Model: ZC-A-12F."
recalls.Title: DINBooonLUX 12-Inch Full Size Hybrid Mattresses Recalled for Fire Hazard Risk

Remedies.Name: Stop using the mattress, mark it as 'Recalled', email a photo to DINBooonLUX, and certify disposal for a full refund.

recalls.metaDescription: DINBooonLUX recalls 12-Inch Full Size Hybrid Mattresses due to fire hazard. Contact for refund and safety instructions.

recalls.Description: HOMEAL is recalling its children's bed rails due to a serious safety hazard. These portable bed rails feature a white steel frame and gray oxford cloth, with the brand name "HOMEAL" visible on the cloth and "Model No.: 338" labeled on the product. The design fails to meet safety standards, creating a risk of entrapment for children when positioned next to a bed.

recalls.Description: Lifepro Fitness has issued a recall for all Bioremedy Infrared Sauna Blankets identified by model numbers LP-BRMDYL-BLK, LP-BRMDYL-GRY, LP-BRMDYR-BLK, LP-BRMDYR-GRY, LP-BRMDYR-BLU, LP-BRMDYR-PNK, and LP-BRMDYR-PRPL. This recall specifically affects blankets featuring a control pad with a gray face. Available in two sizes—31 inches by 71 inches (regular) and 36 inches by 76 inches (large)—the blankets come in various colors including black, gray, pink, and purple. The brand name
recalls.Title: Lifepro Fitness Recalls Bioremedy Infrared Sauna Blankets Due to Burn Hazard
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, consumers can contact Lifepro at 888-491-1690 from 9 a.m. to 5 p.m. ET, Monday through Friday, email recalls@lifeprofitness.com, or visit https://lifeprofitness.com/recall for further details.

Images.Caption: Recalled Lifepro Sauna Blanket
Controller Pad on Recalled Lifepro Sauna Blanket

Injuries.Name: The firm has received 65 reports of the sauna blankets overheating, including 32 reports of burn injuries.

Retailers.Name: Available exclusively online at Lifepro.com, Amazon.com, Walmart, QVC, and Dick's Sporting Goods from September 2022 through June 2025, priced between $179 and $199.

Hazards.Name: Overheating risk leading to burn injuries

Remedies.Name: Stop using and unplug the sauna blanket immediately. Visit the company's website for recall participation instructions and to obtain a replacement. Dispose of the recalled blankets according to local regulations.

recalls.metaDescription: Lifepro Fitness recalls Bioremedy Infrared Sauna Blankets due to burn hazards. Check for details and replacement options.

recalls.Description: Amazon is recalling its Basics Premium Foam Eurotop Mattresses due to a significant fire hazard that violates federal mattress flammability standards. These mattresses, available in twin, full, queen, and king sizes, feature a white top panel and a gray side panel, with an Amazon Basics tag located on the foot panel. They were manufactured between December 22, 2022, and May 16, 2024, and include specific identifiers on a label found on the center seam of the foot panel.
recalls.Title: Amazon Recalls Amazon Basics Premium Foam Eurotop Mattresses Due to Fire Hazard
recalls.ConsumerContact: For further information, consumers can contact Amazon at 800-913-4350 from 8 a.m. to 5 p.m. ET, Monday through Friday, or visit http://amazoneurotoprecall.expertinquiry.com/ or www.Amazon.com and navigate to the "Recalls and Product Safety Alerts" section.

Products.Name: Amazon Basics Premium Foam Eurotop Mattresses

Images.Caption: Recalled Amazon Basics Premium Foam Eurotop Mattress
The Amazon Basics tag is located on the foot panel of the recalled mattress
The date of manufacture, SKU and prototype ID are on a white label on the center seam of the foot panel

Retailers.Name: Available on Amazon.com from January 2023 to June 2024, priced between $82 and $278.

Distributors.Name: Amazon.com Services LLC, of Seattle, Washington

Hazards.Name: Fire hazard due to violation of mattress flammability standards

Remedies.Name: Stop using the mattress immediately and follow Amazon's instructions for obtaining a full refund. Mark the mattress as "Recalled" with a permanent marker, submit a photo of it to http://amazoneurotoprecall.expertinquiry.com, and certify its disposal. A full refund will be issued upon receipt of the photo and certification, either to a valid payment method in the consumer's Amazon wallet or as an Amazon gift card. Dispose of the mattress according to local regulations.

recalls.metaDescription: Amazon recalls Premium Foam Eurotop Mattresses due to fire hazards. Learn how to get a refund and ensure safety.

recalls.Description: Aiho has issued a recall for its five-drawer dressers due to significant safety concerns. These dressers, measuring approximately 16 inches deep, 28 inches wide, and 37 inches tall, can become unstable if not properly anchored to the wall. This poses a serious risk of tip-over and entrapment, especially for children. The model number "AP23-W" can be found on the product packaging.
recalls.Title: Aiho Five-Drawer Dressers Recalled for Tip-Over and Entrapment Risks
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, consumers should reach out to Aiho via email at support@aiholife.com or visit hiapes.com/pages/aiho-recall. Additional information can be found by clicking the "Recall" link at the top of https://hiapes.com.

Images.Caption: Recalled Aiho Five-Drawer Dresser (front)
Recalled Aiho Five-Drawer Dresser (back)
Recalled Aiho Five-Drawer Dresser (side)
Model number "AP23-W" is printed on the product packaging

Retailers.Name: Available on Walmart.com by Aiho from September 2023 through March 2025 for approximately $80.

Distributors.Name: Shenzhen Yiqun Technology Co. Ltd. dba Aiho Inc., of China

Hazards.Name: Risk of tip-over and entrapment, especially for children, if not anchored to the wall; does not comply with mandatory safety standards.

Remedies.Name: Immediately stop using the dressers if they are unanchored, keep them away from children, and contact Aiho for disposal instructions to receive a full refund. A photo of the disposed dresser must be sent to support@aiholife.com.

recalls.metaDescription: Aiho recalls five-drawer dressers due to serious tip-over risks. Learn how to safely dispose of them for a full refund.

recalls.Description: WLIVE is recalling its Fabric 15-Drawer Dressers due to significant safety concerns related to tip-over and entrapment hazards. These dressers, available in rustic brown, black, charcoal black wood grain, and white, measure approximately 12 inches long, 40 inches wide, and 51 inches tall, weighing around 36 pounds. The model number "ASNG105" can be found on the packaging box.
recalls.Title: WLIVE Fabric 15-Drawer Dressers Recalled Due to Tip-Over and Entrapment Risks
recalls.ConsumerContact: For further assistance, consumers can reach WLIVE at 833-367-7572 from 9 a.m. to 6 p.m. PT, Monday through Friday, email wliveproductrecall@wlivehome.com, or visit http://wlivehome.com/ and click on "Recall" for more details.

Images.Caption: Recalled WLIVE Fabric 15-Drawer Dresser in Rustic Brown
Recalled WLIVE Fabric 15-Drawer Dresser in White
Recalled WLIVE Fabric 15-Drawer Dresser in Black
Recalled WLIVE Fabric 15-Drawer Dresser in Black Wood Grain

Manufacturers.Name: Jiangsu Zhi Pai Furniture Manufacturing Co. Ltd., of China

Retailers.Name: Available on Amazon from April 2024 through May 2025 for approximately $110.

Hazards.Name: Unstable dressers that can tip over if not anchored, posing serious risks of injury or death to children, violating federal safety standards as per the STURDY Act.

Remedies.Name: Consumers should cease using the dressers if they are not wall-anchored and move them out of children's reach. Contact WLIVE for disposal instructions to obtain a full refund, including submitting a photo of the disposed dresser to wliveproductrecall@wlivehome.com. WLIVE and Amazon are notifying all known buyers directly.

recalls.metaDescription: WLIVE recalls Fabric 15-Drawer Dressers due to serious tip-over risks. Immediate action required for safety and refunds.

recalls.Description: MaxKare Electric Blankets, featuring six heat settings and a nine-hour auto-off feature, are being recalled due to potential overheating issues. The affected blankets are available in three sizes: twin (62 x 84 inches), full (72 x 84 inches), and queen (84 x 90 inches). The recall specifically includes model numbers HB18A-7284-1, HB18A-8490-2, and HB18A-6284-1, which can be identified by the MaxKare brand tag on the blanket. These blankets are offered in brown and gray and are machine washable for convenience.
recalls.Title: Recall of MaxKare Electric Blankets Due to Fire and Burn Risks
recalls.ConsumerContact: For more information, consumers can reach Yumo at 866-620-0026 from 8 a.m. to 11:30 a.m. ET and 8 p.m. to 11:30 p.m. Monday through Thursday, or visit https://www.marnur.net/pages/important-recall-information or www.marnur.net and select "Important Recall Information."

Images.Caption: Recalled MaxKare Electric Blanket (Model HB18A/ Brown)
Recalled MaxKare Electric Blanket (Model HB18A/ Gray)
Recalled MaxKare Electric Blanket (Model HB18A Gray)
Recalled MaxKare Electric Blanket (Model HB18A Brown)
Recalled MaxKare Model HB18A Electric Blanket Controller

Injuries.Name: Yumo has received 34 reports of overheating, including three reports of burn injuries and two reports that the blankets caught on fire.

Manufacturers.Name: Shenzhen Yumo Commerce and Trade Corporation, of China

Retailers.Name: Exclusively available on Walmart.com from September 2024 through May 2025, priced between $12 and $47.

Hazards.Name: Risk of overheating and potential fire and burn hazards.

Remedies.Name: Consumers should cease use of the recalled blankets immediately and contact Yumo for disposal instructions. A photo of the blanket must be uploaded to yumoofficial@126.com to confirm disposal and obtain a full refund.

recalls.metaDescription: MaxKare Electric Blankets recalled due to fire hazards. Stop using immediately and contact Yumo for a refund.

recalls.Description: Crayan is recalling its 10-inch and 12-inch mattresses available in Twin, Full, Queen, and King sizes due to a serious fire hazard. These single-sided mattresses feature a white knit quilted top with the "Crayan" brand name displayed on the gray side panel and were sold compressed in a box. Important details such as fiber content and size can be found on a white label sewn onto the mattress cover.
recalls.Title: Crayan Mattresses Recalled Due to Fire Hazard Risk; Violation of Federal Flammability Standards
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, consumers can reach Crayan at 779-605-4458 from 5 p.m. to 11 p.m. PT, Monday through Friday, or via email at crayan_service@hotmail.com.

Images.Caption: Recalled Crayan Mattress
Recalled Crayan Mattress Labeling
Recalled Crayan Mattress Labeling
Recalled Crayan Mattress Labeling

Retailers.Name: Available online at Amazon.com from July 2022 through June 2024, priced between $100 and $220.

Distributors.Name: Foshanshi Liyue Jiaju Youxian Gongsi, dba Crayan Inc., of China

Hazards.Name: Failure to meet federal open flame flammability standards, creating a serious fire hazard.

Remedies.Name: Consumers must immediately stop using the recalled mattresses and contact Crayan for a full refund. They will need to permanently mark the mattress with the word "Recalled" in large letters on the white top panel and send a photo of the marked mattress to crayan_service@hotmail.com to confirm disposal before receiving the refund. The company is reaching out to all known purchasers directly.

recalls.metaDescription: Crayan recalls mattresses due to fire hazard risks, offering refunds and disposal instructions for consumers.

recalls.Description: Agro Superior Group is recalling Oliver & Smith-branded 6-inch hybrid mattresses available in various sizes including Twin, Twin-XL, Full, Short Full, Queen, Short Queen, King, and California King. These mattresses feature a white woven ticking with a wavy diamond design on top, white sides with a diamond pattern, and black bottoms. Labels on the mattresses indicate "Oliver & Smith," "PERFECT SLEEP," and "Organic," along with manufacturing details and material contents.
recalls.Title: Agro Superior Group Issues Recall for Oliver & Smith Mattresses Due to Fire Hazard Risk
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, consumers can reach Agro Superior Group at 800-453-5856 from 9:30 a.m. to 4:30 p.m. ET, Monday through Friday, or via email at agrorecall@gmail.com.

Images.Caption: Recalled Oliver & Smith 6-inch Mattress
Recalled Oliver & Smith 6-inch Mattress side seam labels

Retailers.Name: Available online at www.Amazon.com by "Aylas Furniture Store" and www.Walmart.com by "OLIVER & SMITH SINCE 1921" from January 2024 to July 2024, priced between $90 and $180.

Importers.Name: Agro Superior Group LLC, of Princeton, New Jersey

Hazards.Name: Fire hazard due to non-compliance with mandatory mattress flammability standards, posing a risk of serious injury or death.

Remedies.Name: Consumers are advised to cease using the recalled mattresses immediately and contact Agro Superior Group for a complimentary fitted cover that will ensure compliance with federal flammability standards. The company will reach out to all known purchasers directly.

recalls.metaDescription: Agro Superior Group recalls Oliver & Smith mattresses due to fire hazard risks. Contact for a free fitted cover to ensure safety.
